instructions.stateAccess: Read state files from autopilot-state branch via GitHub web UI or API
instructions.lockProtocol: Check locks/ directory before starting work, coordinate via handoffs. Always release locks on completion.
instructions.sessionGuard: CRITICAL: Before any state-changing operation, check session-lock.json. If locked by another agent, ABORT and create a handoff instead.
instructions.releaseProtocol: Follow workspace.json config, create PRs for code changes
instructions.handoffProtocol: Read pending handoffs, update status when starting work
instructions.auditProtocol: Record actions in audit entries after every state mutation
